en: And the word of the LORD came to me, saying,
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到我說：

en: "And you, son of man, will you judge, will you judge the bloody city? Then declare to her all her abominations.
zh: “人子啊，你要審判嗎？你要審判這流人血的城嗎？你要使這城知道它一切可憎的事。

en: You shall say, Thus says the Lord GOD: A city that sheds blood in her midst, so that her time may come, and that makes idols to defile herself!
zh: 你要說：‘主耶和華這樣說：這城中有流人血的事，它製造偶像，玷污自己，以致它受審判的時候來到。

en: You have become guilty by the blood that you have shed, and defiled by the idols that you have made, and you have brought your days near, the appointed time of your years has come. Therefore I have made you a reproach to the nations, and a mockery to all the countries.
zh: 因你流了人的血，你就有罪了；因你做了偶像，你就玷污了自己；這樣，你使你受罰的日子臨近，遭報的年日來到，我使你成為列國辱罵、列邦譏笑的對象。

en: Those who are near and those who are far from you will mock you; your name is defiled; you are full of tumult.
zh: 你這混亂喧嚷、名被玷污的城啊！那些離你近的和離你遠的，都必譏笑你。

en: "Behold, the princes of Israel in you, every one according to his power, have been bent on shedding blood.
zh: 看哪！以色列的領袖們恃著自己的能力，在你裡面流人的血。

en: Father and mother are treated with contempt in you; the sojourner suffers extortion in your midst; the fatherless and the widow are wronged in you.
zh: 在你裡面輕視父母的；在你中間有壓迫寄居的和欺負孤兒寡婦的。

en: You have despised my holy things and profaned my Sabbaths.
zh: 你藐視了我的聖物，褻瀆了我的安息日。

en: There are men in you who slander to shed blood, and people in you who eat on the mountains; they commit lewdness in your midst.
zh: 在你裡面有好讒謗的人，他們要流人的血；在你的山上吃祭肉；又在你中間行淫亂的事。

en: In you men uncover their fathers' nakedness; in you they violate women who are unclean in their menstrual impurity.
zh: 在你裡面有暴露父親下體的；有污辱在經期中不潔的婦人的。

en: One commits abomination with his neighbor's wife; another lewdly defiles his daughter-in-law; another in you violates his sister, his father's daughter.
zh: 在你裡面，這人與鄰舍的妻子行可憎的事；那人行淫亂，玷污自己的兒媳；還有人污辱自己的同胞姊妹。

en: In you they take bribes to shed blood; you take interest and profit and make gain of your neighbors by extortion; but me you have forgotten, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 在你裡面有接受賄賂而流人血的；你借錢給人，收取利息，並且多要；你用欺壓手段向你的鄰舍榨取不義之財；你更忘記了我。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: "Behold, I strike my hand at the dishonest gain that you have made, and at the blood that has been in your midst.
zh: “‘看哪！因你所得的不義之財，又因在你中間所流的血，我就拍掌。

en: Can your courage endure, or can your hands be strong, in the days that I shall deal with you? I the LORD have spoken, and I will do it.
zh: 到了我懲治你的日子，你的心還能受得住嗎？你的手還有力嗎？我耶和華說了，就必實行。

en: I will scatter you among the nations and disperse you through the countries, and I will consume your uncleanness out of you.
zh: 我要把你分散在列國，四散在萬邦；我要從你中間消除你的污穢。

en: And you shall be profaned by your own doing in the sight of the nations, and you shall know that I am the LORD."
zh: 你在列國眼前被玷污的時候，你就知道我是耶和華。’”

en: And the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, the house of Israel has become dross to me; all of them are bronze and tin and iron and lead in the furnace; they are dross of silver.
zh: “人子啊！以色列家在我看來已成了渣滓；他們都是爐中的銅、錫、鐵和鉛；就是銀的渣滓。

en: Therefore thus says the Lord GOD: Because you have all become dross, therefore, behold, I will gather you into the midst of Jerusalem.
zh: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：‘你們既然都成了渣滓，所以，我要把你們集合在耶路撒冷城中。

en: As one gathers silver and bronze and iron and lead and tin into a furnace, to blow the fire on it in order to melt it, so I will gather you in my anger and in my wrath, and I will put you in and melt you.
zh: 人怎樣把銀、銅、鐵、鉛、錫，集合在爐中，吹火使它們熔化，我也照樣在我的怒氣、我的烈怒中，把你們集合起來，放在城中，使你們熔化。

en: I will gather you and blow on you with the fire of my wrath, and you shall be melted in the midst of it.
zh: 我必集合你們，把我烈怒的火吹在你們身上，你們就必在城中熔化。

en: As silver is melted in a furnace, so you shall be melted in the midst of it, and you shall know that I am the LORD; I have poured out my wrath upon you."
zh: 銀子怎樣在爐中熔化，你們也必照樣在城中熔化；你們就知道我耶和華把我的烈怒倒在你身上。’”

en: And the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, say to her, You are a land that is not cleansed or rained upon in the day of indignation.
zh: “人子啊！你要對這地說：‘在忿怒的日子，你是沒有雨水 ，沒有甘霖之地’。

en: The conspiracy of her prophets in her midst is like a roaring lion tearing the prey; they have devoured human lives; they have taken treasure and precious things; they have made many widows in her midst.
zh: 其中的先知叛逆，像吼叫的獅子撕碎獵物；他們把人吞吃，搶奪財物和珍寶，使其中寡婦的數目增多。

en: Her priests have done violence to my law and have profaned my holy things. They have made no distinction between the holy and the common, neither have they taught the difference between the unclean and the clean, and they have disregarded my Sabbaths, so that I am profaned among them.
zh: 這地的祭司違反我的律法，褻瀆我的聖物；他們不分別聖俗，也不教導人分辨甚麼是潔淨的和不潔淨的，又掩目不理我的安息日，以致我在他們中間被褻瀆。

en: Her princes in her midst are like wolves tearing the prey, shedding blood, destroying lives to get dishonest gain.
zh: 其中的官長好像撕碎獵物的豺狼，流人的血，滅人的命，為要得不義之財。

en: And her prophets have smeared whitewash for them, seeing false visions and divining lies for them, saying, 'Thus says the Lord GOD,' when the LORD has not spoken.
zh: 這地的先知用灰泥給他們粉刷牆壁，為他們見虛假的異象，行騙人的占卜，說：‘主耶和華這樣說’，其實當時耶和華並沒有說話。

en: The people of the land have practiced extortion and committed robbery. They have oppressed the poor and needy, and have extorted from the sojourner without justice.
zh: 這地的人民常常欺壓人，慣行搶掠，虧待困苦窮乏的人，毫無公理地去欺壓寄居的人。

en: And I sought for a man among them who should build up the wall and stand in the breach before me for the land, that I should not destroy it, but I found none.
zh: 我在他們中間尋找一人重修牆垣，在我面前為這地站在破口之處，使我不毀滅這地，我卻找不到一個。

en: Therefore I have poured out my indignation upon them. I have consumed them with the fire of my wrath. I have returned their way upon their heads, declares the Lord GOD."
zh: 所以我把我的忿怒倒在他們身上，用我烈怒之火消滅他們，把他們所行的報應在他們的頭上。這是主耶和華的宣告。”
